actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in right-wing news coverage due to multiple high-profile incidents, including an assassination attempt during the White House Correspondents' Dinner and his administration's controversial policies. His statements and actions continue to drive significant media attention, with debates over his security, rhetoric, and political influence dominating the news cycle.

actors.name: Santiago Abascal
actors.blurb: Santiago Abascal continues to drive significant coverage as the leader of Vox, particularly due to the party's controversial policies and coalition agreements with the PP in regions like Extremadura and Aragón. His rhetoric on immigration, national priority, and political alliances keeps Vox in the spotlight, often sparking debates and protests.

actors.name: Péter Magyar
actors.blurb: Péter Magyar has emerged as a defining figure in Hungary's political landscape following his party's landslide victory in the April 2026 elections. His actions, including negotiations with the EU over frozen funds and calls for immediate government action against corruption, have positioned him as a key actor in reshaping Hungary's domestic and international policies.
